pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam DC for the Q3 electronic component stock. We've got some weird discrepancies between our WMS and the physical count. Can you look at this table and tell me if you see any patterns or common reasons for these mismatches?

| Part ID | Description | WMS Count | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| EC-9902 | Micro-controller Unit (MCU) | 1420 | 1418 | -2 |
| EC-4412 | Resistor Array 10k | 8500 | 8495 | -5 |
| EC-1105 | Capacitors 10uF | 3200 | 3200 | 0 |
| EC-7782 | Voltage Regulator | 540 | 537 | -3 |
| EC-2291 | LED Array Blue | 1200 | 1204 | +4 |
| EC-5530 | Logic Gate IC | 980 | 976 | -4 |

mostly small numbers, but it's happening across different categories.

"The Recipient shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Disclosing Party from and against any and all losses, damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or resulting from any breach of this Agreement by the Recipient or any unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information by the Recipient or its representatives."
